name: publish_linkedin
description: Publish one client's approved, voice_qa-passed post_draft to LinkedIn via the w_member_social self-serve share scope — the SECONDARY publish platform (Slice 6a, not walking-skeleton-critical). Called by the publisher specialist only after a fresh, per-post agency_approve exists AND only for clients who have LinkedIn publish enabled. Independent of publish_x's outcome in both directions.

text.description: Exact post text, sourced verbatim from post_draft.text.

approval_id.description: The single-use approval_id authorizing this exact publish.

approval_policy.description: Same per-post, single-use approval contract as publish_x — see that manifest. LinkedIn's attempt is independent: X succeeding does not authorize LinkedIn, and vice versa.

side_effects: Publishes a real, publicly visible post to the client's LinkedIn account, once Slice 6a's w_member_social scope is granted.
Irreversible via this tool (no unpublish/delete capability exposed).
notes: Not walking-skeleton-critical. Until Slice 6a ships and a given client has LinkedIn enabled, publisher should treat this platform as status: 'not_applicable' without calling this tool at all.
